response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:14: Identified 'Dancing Reed' via on-screen text and audio, performed by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope. Lyrics found. 2. 03:14-03:16: Talk segment. 3. 03:16-05:00: Identified 'Dawn Blue' via on-screen text and audio, performed by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope. Lyrics found.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope performing two songs, 'Dancing Reed' and 'Dawn Blue', with interspersed talk segments.

scenes.description: Performance of 'Dancing Reed' by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Okey Dokey 返事はいいけど 冗談なら笑えないよ 渋滞 曖昧 どっちを向いちゃうの 蜃気楼に手を伸ばした
微熱のような夢物語 そんな光は見ない振りしていた ざわめく鼓動 まだ行かないで 幻じゃ嫌だよ
私を奪って 魅惑のDancing Dancing night 拡がって収まんない Universe 君の表情は 私の森羅万象を 書き換えちゃうかも 責任重大ね
一切合切Dance Dance Dance We Are Dancing Reed 夢中になって絡み合った ゼログラビティ 構わずDance Dance Dance Just a Dance Just a Dance 声は闇に預けたまま 目を覚ましても離れないで
Maybe Needy 正気じゃないのよ 体温が忘れられない 誰 彼 そんなじゃないから 独り占めしてEuphoria
気にしてない様な 言葉は装飾で メイクの様には流せない 360°偽りだって 隠しきれぬような
私に構って 嬉しいなんてCrazy Crazy Love 摩天楼から連れさらって 君の表情は 私の深層心理を すり替えちゃうのよ 責任重大ね 過ぎ去ったネオン 残像 Shooting Star
グライダーみたいに漂えば 幸も不幸もなかった 指先でまた君を探している その声を聴かせてよ
私に構って 教えてよ恋の先を！ 拡がって収まんない Universe 君の存在は 私の将来までも 踏み込んだのよ 付き合ってよね
一切合切Dance Dance Dance We Are Dancing Reed 夢中になって絡み合った ゼログラビティ 構わずDance Dance Dance Just a Dance Just a Dance 声は闇に預けたまま 目を覚ましても離れないで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Okey Dokey The reply is fine, but I can't laugh if it's a joke Traffic jam, ambiguous, which way are you facing? I reached out my hand to the mirage A dream story like a slight fever I was pretending not to see that light Thrumming heartbeat, don't go yet I hate that it's a phantom Steal me, fascinating dancing, dancing night Expanding, won't fit, universe Your expression might rewrite my whole world That's a huge responsibility Everything, dance, dance, dance, we are dancing reed Entangled in being lost, zero gravity Without caring, dance, dance, dance, just a dance, just a dance Leaving my voice in the darkness Don't let me go even if I wake up Maybe needy, I'm not sane I can't forget your body temperature Not that it's anyone else, keep it to myself, euphoria Words that seem like I don't care are just decoration Can't wash them away like makeup Even 360 degrees of lies Cannot be hidden Pay attention to me, that I'm happy, crazy, crazy love Take me away from the skyscraper Your expression will replace my inner psychology That's a huge responsibility Fading neon, afterimage shooting star If I drift like a glider There was neither happiness nor unhappiness I'm searching for you again with my fingertips Let me hear that voice Pay attention to me, tell me what lies beyond love! Expanding, won't fit, universe Your existence has stepped into my future too Go out with me Everything, dance, dance, dance, we are dancing reed Entangled in being lost, zero gravity Without caring, dance, dance, dance, just a dance, just a dance Leaving my voice in the darkness Don't let me go even if I wake up
